1713	type Run struct {
1714		// Stable identifier for this run record
1715		ID string `json:"id"`
1716		// Which layer this record belongs to
1717		Layer RunLayer `json:"layer"`
1718		// Current status (pending, running, success, failure, preserved)
1719		Status string `json:"status"`
1720		// Project ID this run belongs to (set for all runs; enables combined cross-project views)
1721		ProjectID *string `json:"projectID,omitempty"`
1722		// When the run started
1723		StartedAt *string `json:"startedAt,omitempty"`
1724		// When the run completed (null if still running)
1725		CompletedAt *string `json:"completedAt,omitempty"`
1726		// Bead ID associated with this run (null for work-layer records with multiple beads)
1727		BeadID *string `json:"beadId,omitempty"`
1728		// Artifact ID produced by this run (null if none)
1729		ArtifactID *string `json:"artifactId,omitempty"`
1730		// Parent run ID (null for top-level work records)
1731		ParentRunID *string `json:"parentRunId,omitempty"`
1732		// IDs of child runs (try records for work, run records for try)
1733		ChildRunIds []string `json:"childRunIds"`
1734		// Raw queue inputs as JSON (work layer only)
1735		QueueInputs *string `json:"queueInputs,omitempty"`
1736		// Stop condition for the queue drain (work layer only)
1737		StopCondition *string `json:"stopCondition,omitempty"`
1738		// Bead IDs selected for this queue drain (work layer only)
1739		SelectedBeadIds []string `json:"selectedBeadIds,omitempty"`
1740		// Git revision the try attempt started from (try layer only)
1741		BaseRevision *string `json:"baseRevision,omitempty"`
1742		// Git revision produced by the try attempt (try layer only)
1743		ResultRevision *string `json:"resultRevision,omitempty"`
1744		// Isolated worktree path used during the attempt (try layer only)
1745		WorktreePath *string `json:"worktreePath,omitempty"`
1746		// Merge or preserve outcome (try layer only)
1747		MergeOutcome *string `json:"mergeOutcome,omitempty"`
1748		// Check results as JSON (try layer only)
1749		CheckResults *string `json:"checkResults,omitempty"`
1750		// Short summary of the prompt (run layer only)
1751		PromptSummary *string `json:"promptSummary,omitempty"`
1752		// Minimum power/effort level requested (run layer only)
1753		PowerMin *int `json:"powerMin,omitempty"`
1754		// Maximum power/effort level requested (run layer only)
1755		PowerMax *int `json:"powerMax,omitempty"`
1756		// Agent harness used (run layer only)

1760		// Model identifier (run layer only)

1076	"""RunLayer identifies which layer of the work/try/run hierarchy a Run belongs to"""
1077	enum RunLayer {
1078	  """Top-level queue drain: encompasses one or more try attempts"""
1079	  work
1080	  """Single bead attempt: encompasses one or more run invocations"""
1081	  try
1082	  """Single agent invocation with a specific harness/model"""
1083	  run
1084	}
1085	
1086	"""
1087	Run is a record in the three-layer work→try→run substrate from the FEAT-010
1088	agent execute workflow. It is distinct from ExecutionRun (definition-driven
1089	check/benchmark results) and Execution (execute-bead bundle).
1090	"""
1091	type Run implements Node {
1092	  """Stable identifier for this run record"""
1093	  id: ID!

1095	  layer: RunLayer!

1097	  status: String!

1103	  completedAt: DateTime

1105	  beadId: String
1106	  """Artifact ID produced by this run (null if none)"""
1107	  artifactId: String
1108	  """Parent run ID (null for top-level work records)"""
1109	  parentRunId: String
1110	  """IDs of child runs (try records for work, run records for try)"""
1111	  childRunIds: [String!]!
1112	
1113	  # ── Work-layer fields (populated when layer = work) ────────────────────
1114	  """Raw queue inputs as JSON (work layer only)"""
1115	  queueInputs: JSON
1116	  """Stop condition for the queue drain (work layer only)"""
1117	  stopCondition: String
1118	  """Bead IDs selected for this queue drain (work layer only)"""
1119	  selectedBeadIds: [String!]
1120	
1121	  # ── Try-layer fields (populated when layer = try) ──────────────────────
1122	  """Git revision the try attempt started from (try layer only)"""
1123	  baseRevision: String
1124	  """Git revision produced by the try attempt (try layer only)"""
1125	  resultRevision: String
1126	  """Isolated worktree path used during the attempt (try layer only)"""
1127	  worktreePath: String
1128	  """Merge or preserve outcome (try layer only)"""
1129	  mergeOutcome: String
1130	  """Check results as JSON (try layer only)"""
1131	  checkResults: JSON
1132	
1133	  # ── Run-layer fields (populated when layer = run) ──────────────────────
1134	  """Short summary of the prompt (run layer only)"""
1135	  promptSummary: String
1136	  """Minimum power/effort level requested (run layer only)"""
1137	  powerMin: Int
1138	  """Maximum power/effort level requested (run layer only)"""
1139	  powerMax: Int
1140	  """Agent harness used (run layer only)"""
1141	  harness: String
1142	  """Provider name (run layer only)"""
1143	  provider: String
1144	  """Model identifier (run layer only)"""
1145	  model: String
1146	  """Input token count (run layer only)"""
1147	  tokensIn: Int
1148	  """Output token count (run layer only)"""
1149	  tokensOut: Int
1150	  """Estimated cost in USD (run layer only)"""
1151	  costUsd: Float
1152	  """Duration in milliseconds (run layer only)"""
1153	  durationMs: Int
1154	  """Short excerpt from the agent output (run layer only)"""
1155	  outputExcerpt: String
1156	  """Links to execution evidence (bundle paths, log paths, etc.) (run layer only)"""
1157	  evidenceLinks: [String!]
1158	}

19	// executionBundleManifest captures the union of fields used by either the
20	// rich manifest schema (attempt_id, bead, paths, ...) and the older terse
21	// schema (harness, model, base_rev, result_rev, verdict, bead_id,
22	// execution_dir).
23	type executionBundleManifest struct {
24		AttemptID    string `json:"attempt_id,omitempty"`
25		WorkerID     string `json:"worker_id,omitempty"`

27		BaseRev      string `json:"base_rev,omitempty"`
28		ResultRev    string `json:"result_rev,omitempty"`
29		Verdict      string `json:"verdict,omitempty"`

31		Model        string `json:"model,omitempty"`
32		ExecutionDir string `json:"execution_dir,omitempty"`

34		Requested    struct {
35			Harness string `json:"harness,omitempty"`
36			Model   string `json:"model,omitempty"`
37		} `json:"requested,omitempty"`
38		Bead struct {
39			ID    string `json:"id,omitempty"`
40			Title string `json:"title,omitempty"`
41		} `json:"bead,omitempty"`
42		Paths struct {
43			Dir      string `json:"dir,omitempty"`
44			Prompt   string `json:"prompt,omitempty"`
45			Manifest string `json:"manifest,omitempty"`
46			Result   string `json:"result,omitempty"`

input.command:
git add cli/internal/server/state_runs.go cli/internal/server/state_runs_test.go && git commit -m "fix(server): canonicalize Run layering — bundles → try, sessions → run [ddx-65543530]

Bundles in .ddx/executions/ represent execute-bead attempts (try layer);
AgentSession entries represent individual agent invocations (run layer).
Previously bundles were synthesized as run-layer Runs and sessions were
not projected onto Runs at all, conflating the two layers.

state_runs.go:
- executionBundleToRun now emits RunLayerTry, populating baseRevision,
  resultRevision, and mergeOutcome (derived from verdict + resultRev).
- Add synthesizeRunsFromSessions to project SessionIndexEntry rows onto
  RunLayerRun records — harness/provider/model/tokens/cost/duration map
  losslessly; sessions whose BundlePath points at a bundle are parented
  to the matching exec-<id> try.
- loadRunsForProject merges sessions alongside bundles, dedup by id.

state_runs_test.go: layering correctness — bundle yields layer=try with
revs and merge outcome, bundle-linked session yields layer=run parented
to the try, orphan session yields layer=run with no parent."

data.text:
Committed. Summary:

- `state_runs.go`: `executionBundleToRun` now emits `RunLayerTry` with `baseRevision`/`resultRevision`/`mergeOutcome`; new `synthesizeRunsFromSessions` projects `SessionIndexEntry` → `RunLayerRun` Runs (harness, provider, model, tokens, cost, duration, status); session `BundlePath` parents the run to the matching `exec-<id>` try.
- `loadRunsForProject` merges sessions alongside bundles with id dedup.
- `state_runs_test.go`: new layering test covering bundle→try, bundle-linked session→run with parent, and orphan session→run without parent.
- All `./internal/server/...` tests pass.
